results.text: Jet Kwajah - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. A high-activity player, Kwajah sprints up on breakouts, acting as a fourth forward on the rush, catching and redistributing passes, and firing deflectable shots from the line. Jet Kwajah Hockey Stats and Profile at hockeydb.com. Statistics of Jet Kwajah, a hockey player from Toronto, ONT born Mar 13 2008 who was active from 2023 to 2026.
